Releases
    version="1.0.0" => ARM.DMA350.1.0.0.pack

Overview
    The DMA350 pack provides driver implementation for DMA350 peripheral, and
    MCU Driver HAL API abstraction for the DMA.

Limitations
    1. This pack supports and is tested with Arm compiler armclang 6 and Arm GCC
       version 11.3.

Components
    I.   Native driver:
          Implements low-level driver, and library for DMA350.
    II.  MDH API:
          Defines MCU Driver HAL API abstraction for the DMA.
